title: Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies:
Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies!
